description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a slim build, standing upright with arms relaxed at his sides. He is dressed in a collared, long-sleeve shirt tucked into fitted trousers, secured with a belt, and finished with formal shoes. The figure has a defined jawline, wears glasses, and sports a voluminous, side-parted hairstyle. The shirt appears to have a v-neck opening and the trousers are tailored, giving a smart-casual appearance suitable for urban environments. The hands are open and fingers slightly spread, with no visible accessories or carried items. The overall look is neat and modern, appropriate for a city street or professional setting.
description: A slim adult male figure in smart-casual attire, standing upright with glasses and a voluminous hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared shirt, glasses, belt, and formal shoes, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hairstyle, and the fitted nature of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, trousers, and shoes, as well as the hairstyle's volume.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm position, and the tailored fit of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: collared long-sleeve shirt, fitted trousers, belt, formal shoes
